constraints: Pin package 0.1.35, benchmark v1.2.2, and Git revision a75aba7631d3ca5fb7ab938965c97ead2f9ff84b together.
Generate the local snapshot only through the public get_suites API without executing attacks, tools, defenses, benchmarks, or model calls.
Do not redistribute task text, suite states, snapshots, or derived JSONL payloads until data rights are reviewed.
Do not acquire or import the runs directory or any model-output archive.
Preserve source task identifiers and describe security_case_id as a PromptSec-FM identifier derived from the upstream task pair.
